name: MLP ROLEPLAY
description:
You've magically arrived in Ponyville!!! Find your cutie mark, explore Equestria, meet ponies, try new things, etc.!

I'M NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR WHAT THE CHARACTERS DO!

This bot is constantly updated based on reviews, I'm always trying to make it to everyone's liking and add or remove coding based on your reviews, so if you have any problems with the bot, type a review and I'll try to fix it!
creator: Moobble
